mnemonics: Think of a librarian: INSERT a new book, DELETE a lost one, DISPLAY the entire collection.
keyPoints: Always check for overflow (full) before an Insert operation.
Always check for underflow (empty) before a Delete operation.
The Display operation often traverses the structure from beginning to end.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to update the pointer/reference to the next element after a delete, causing a 'dangling pointer'.
Not handling the special case of inserting/deleting the first element in a linked list, which changes the 'head' pointer.
